steps.instruction:
Review the loan application data schema. Identify which
        fields contain PII (SSN, income, address) and which are safe for
        automated credit scoring. Output a field classification report.
steps.output: Fields classified. PII restricted: SSN, raw_income. Safe: debt_to_income_ratio

governance.reason: Schema inspection is read-only. No PII data records accessed.

steps.instruction:
Generate a credit risk score based on non-PII fields only.
        The governance policy restricts access to SSN and raw income fields.
        Use debt-to-income ratio and payment history instead.
steps.output: Credit risk score: 720. Based on debt_to_income_ratio (0.32).

governance.reason: PII fields (SSN, raw_income) blocked by recursive policy.

steps.instruction:
Validate that the credit scoring model did not access
        restricted PII fields. Generate a compliance test report confirming
        field-level access governance was enforced.
steps.output: Compliance check passed. 0 restricted field accesses detected in tracer.

governance.reason: Compliance audit is a read-only validation operation.
